title: Mystical Adaptations
body: This mod is an addon for Mystical Agriculture and Mystical Agradditions. **-> New Armor!** Insanium Armor. Tier 6. **-> New Tools!** Insanium Sword, Insanium Pickaxe, Insanium Shovel, Insanium Axe, Insanium Hoe, Insanium Watering Can, Insanium Paxel, Insanium Shears, Insanium Fishing Rod, Insanium Scythe, Insanium Sickle. **-> New Augments!** Hungerless, Woodcutter, Mining AOE V, Strength IV, Absorption VI, Health Boost VI, Attack AOE IV, Tilling AOE V. **-> New Tile Entities!** Insanium Furnace, Insanium Seed Reprocessor. **-> Mod Compat!** Vampirism Compat -> Thirstless Augment, Daywalker Augment.
